title: MCP-A explain Response
description: Response for the explain primitive (SPEC §6): the routing decision, domains considered/queried, per-source latencies and confidences, and feedback acknowledgement. Returns routing only for the user's own answers.

question_classified_as.description: How the system understood the question.

routing_decision.description: Why the queried domains were chosen, including alternatives considered with scores. MUST include alternative routings (SPEC §6).

source_latencies.description: Per-domain compile latency in milliseconds, keyed by domain_id.

additionalProperties.description: Milliseconds to compile for this domain.

confidence_per_source.description: Per-domain confidence in [0.0, 1.0], keyed by domain_id.

feedback_recorded.description: True if feedback was provided and recorded.
